_about: Outcomes (stat-strip) for each of the 8 service pages. Edit via /admin/ -> Service pages. Numbers update quarterly.

capabilities.title: Six Capabilities. One closed-loop delivery system.

capabilities.title: Four building blocks. One reasoning backbone.

items.title: Enterprise Knowledge Graph Spine
items.kicker: A unified system of record for the whole estate
bullets: Unified record across code, services, data, operations and governance

Real-time updates via Git, service mesh, data catalogs and ITSM

bullets: Fuses graph intelligence, memory-augmented agents and RAG

capabilities.title: Three pillars. One execution-safe intelligence layer.

items.title: The "What Should Be" Layer
items.kicker: Typed, time-versioned graph of enterprise reality
bullets: Models services, data, users, goals, failures, decisions and policies
Immutable, versioned, time-indexed for full historical traceability
Neuro-symbolic reasoning from current state to target state
Risk-assessed execution plans and blast-radius prediction

items.title: Tiered Memory System
items.kicker: Persistent memory that learns, adapts, improves
bullets: Execution Memory: in-flight state, strategies, tool outputs
Episodic Memory: past runs, failures and root causes
Semantic Memory: generalised workflows and reusable knowledge
Principle Memory: policies, invariants and compliance rules

items.title: Provenance-Native Decisioning
items.kicker: Every action linked to its full execution lineage
bullets: Links every decision to context consulted and memory referenced
Records strategy selected, policy evaluated and outcome observed
Enables explainability, audits and rollback safety
